prompt: Mobile game ad endcard for "Flappy Dunk". Vertical 9:16 portrait composition, premium mobile UA creative quality, app store ad endcard final frame. Composition: bold game wordmark/logo prominently centered in the upper third (clean, legible, occupying ~30% of the frame width). A large dominant character or signature gameplay asset fills the middle third — must be instantly recognisable as belonging to this specific game, NOT generic stock-game art. Bottom third: a high-contrast bold CTA button reading "PLAY NOW" with a vibrant gradient and rounded corners, plus the standard "Download on the App Store" and "GET IT ON Google Play" badges side-by-side just below the CTA. Style: cinematic mobile-game-poster lighting, clean background that matches the game's brand mood, no clutter, high color contrast for thumb-stopping power on a phone screen. Visual style: 2D cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat shading, and vibrant, high-contrast colors.. UI mood: energetic/competitive. Brand palette: primary #EAD5A0, secondary #D81155, accent #5CB3FF — use these for the CTA button, the wordmark, and the background gradient. Hint at the core mechanic (tapping, physics-timing, scoring) in the middle-third gameplay imagery. Target feel: Casual gamers of all ages looking for quick, reflex-based competitive gameplay.. Final negative: no real human celebrities, no copyrighted IP outside this game, no Apple/Google logos beyond the standard store badges, no QR codes, no text other than the game name and the CTA.
